text: ⚡️ 🇲🇽 🇺🇸 Mexican Security Secretary Harfuch announced that Mexican special forces arrested Audias Flores Silva, El Jardinero, in Nayarit State, north of Jalisco State. He added that Silva is being sought by the U.S. for extradition. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇲🇽 🇺🇸 墨西哥安全部长哈尔富奇宣布，墨西哥特种部队在哈利斯科州北部的纳亚里特州逮捕了奥迪亚斯·弗洛雷斯·席尔瓦（Audias Flores Silva，绰号“园丁”）。他补充说，美国正在寻求引渡席尔瓦。 @wfwitness

text: Marco Rubio on Iran: Iran cannot be the sole beneficiaries of an illegal, unlawful, and unjustified system of tolling and control in the straits.
text_zh: 马可·鲁比奥谈伊朗：伊朗不能成为海峡非法、不公正的通行费和控制体系的唯一受益者。

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Greg Bovino, former U.S. Border Patrol Chief, says mass deportations have slowed down due to aspects within the Trump admin lacking the fortitude and willpower, thus getting "cold feet," likely due to unpopular polling and politics. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048894517818884552/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 前美国边境巡逻队负责人格雷格·博维诺表示，由于特朗普政府内部缺乏勇气和意志，导致大规模驱逐行动放缓，从而出现了“退缩”现象，这很可能是由于民调不佳和政治因素所致。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048894517818884552/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel WSJ: President Trump is prepared to restart the war if talks fail, remains doubtful over Iran’s latest proposal on the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048894220925046786/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报《华尔街日报》：特朗普总统已准备好在谈判失败的情况下重启战争，并对伊朗关于霍尔木兹海峡的最新提议持怀疑态度。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048894220925046786/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @HALLONSA : I defended Israel for a long time. But it can't be done anymore. You are so fucking crazy that you support Russia, which both supports those who want to destroy Israel and who are committing genocide against Ukraine. You should be ashamed. You are contributing to the genocide with your money. Dear Minister, Diplomatic relations, especially between friendly nations, are not conducted on Twitter or in the media. Allegations are not evidence. Evidence substantiating the allegations have yet to be provided. You did not even submit a request for legal assistance before turning to the media and social networks. The matter will be examined. Israel is a state that abides by the rule of law with independent law enforcement authorities. All Israeli authorities will act in accordance with the law. - Gideon Sa'ar | גדעון סער tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @HALLONSA：我长期以来一直为以色列辩护。但现在再也做不到了。你们真是疯了，竟然支持俄罗斯，而俄罗斯既支持那些想要摧毁以色列的人，又在对乌克兰进行种族灭绝。你们应该感到羞耻。你们正在用自己的钱资助种族灭绝。尊敬的部长，外交关系，特别是友好国家之间的关系，不是在推特或媒体上进行的。指控不等于证据。证实这些指控的证据尚未提供。在诉诸媒体和社交网络之前，你们甚至没有提交法律协助请求。此事将进行调查。以色列是一个遵守法治、拥有独立执法机构的国家。所有以色列当局都将依法行事。 - 吉迪恩·萨尔 | גדעון סער 推文

text: WarMonitor Recent data shows more Americans are leaving the U.S. than in past years, with a clear uptick in 2025 and clear signs it’s continuing into this year. Trump: "For the first time in more than 50 years, we now have reverse migration. A beautiful thing actually." https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2048886607718101115/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 最近的数据显示，离开美国的美国人比过去几年更多，2025年有明显的增长，且有明显迹象表明这种趋势持续到今年。特朗普：“这是50多年来我们第一次出现反向移民。实际上是一件美妙的事情。” https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2048886607718101115/video/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Sec. Scott Bessent: “While the surviving IRGC Leaders are trapped like drowning rats in a sewage pipe, Iran’s creaking oil industry is starting to shut in production thanks to the U.S. BLOCKADE. Pumping will soon collapse. GASOLINE SHORTAGES IN IRAN NEXT!” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048891435357794781/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国部长斯科特·贝森特：“当幸存的伊斯兰革命卫队领导人像掉进下水道的溺水老鼠一样被困住时，由于美国的封锁，伊朗摇摇欲坠的石油工业正开始停产。开采量很快就会崩溃。伊朗接下来将面临汽油短缺！” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048891435357794781/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Aviation_Intel : Russia’s Stealthy S-71K Air-Launched Missile Seen In New Detail The missile aims to be a less expensive, but still survivable standoff weapon option that can be built in large numbers. https://www.twz.com/air/russias-stealthy-s-71k-air-launched-missile-seen-in-unprecedented-detail tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转推 @Aviation_Intel：俄罗斯隐身S-71K空射导弹细节曝光。该导弹旨在成为一种成本较低但仍具备生存能力的防区外武器选择，可以大规模制造。 https://www.twz.com/air/russias-stealthy-s-71k-air-launched-missile-seen-in-unprecedented-detail 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : The Trump Administration is considering using the Defense Production Act as part of a strategy to save the beleaguered Spirit Airlines, who has declared bankruptcy for the second time in two years as the Iran War drives up jet fuel costs for all domestic and international airlines, according to U.S. officials familiar with the discussions who spoke to CBS News. Under the bailout plan being discussed, the government would lend Spirit $500 million at a reasonable rate interest, and become the top debtor in the bankruptcy pecking order. The loan would be protected by Spirit assets that would exceed the government's costs, while providing taxpayers with a warrant - the right to own 90% of the company after it emerges from bankruptcy, then likely being sold to another carrier, potentially American or Delta. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @sentdefender：据熟悉讨论并向哥伦比亚广播公司新闻部透露消息的美国官员称，特朗普政府正在考虑利用《国防生产法》作为拯救陷入困境的精灵航空（Spirit Airlines）的战略一部分。该公司在两年内第二次宣布破产，原因是伊朗战争推高了所有国内和国际航空公司的航空燃油成本。根据正在讨论的救助计划，政府将以合理的利率向精灵航空提供5亿美元贷款，并成为破产清算顺序中的首要债权人。该贷款将由超过政府成本的精灵航空资产作为担保，同时为纳税人提供认股权证——即在公司破产重组后拥有其90%股份的权利，随后很可能将其出售给另一家航空公司，可能是美国航空或达美航空。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @BrantPhilip_ : Three large explosions followed by intense gunfire a short while ago near the Senou International Airport just south of Bamako, capital of Mali. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转推 @BrantPhilip_：不久前，马里首都巴马科以南的塞努国际机场附近发生了三次大爆炸，随后伴有激烈的枪声。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @yarotrof : @JustasPauliuko1 And it would be foolish for Israel to be on the wrong side of what is the existential security and geopolitical issue for Europe, for the sake of a few million dollars in a stolen-goods discount on grain. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @yarotrof：@JustasPauliuko1 如果以色列为了几百万美元的赃物折扣而站在欧洲生存安全和地缘政治问题的错误一边，那将是愚蠢的。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @JEyal_RUSI : The same obtuse Israeli response, with a mixture of lies and half-truths, is offered to Arab governments, as it is offered to Ukraine. No engagement with the substance of the case; just hurling abuse and accusations. Disgraceful, really Dear Minister, Diplomatic relations, especially between friendly nations, are not conducted on Twitter or in the media. Allegations are not evidence. Evidence substantiating the allegations have yet to be provided. You did not even submit a request for legal assistance before turning to the media and social networks. The matter will be examined. Israel is a state that abides by the rule of law with independent law enforcement authorities. All Israeli authorities will act in accordance with the law. - Gideon Sa'ar | גדעון סער tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @JEyal_RUSI：同样的迟钝的以色列回应，混合着谎言和半真半假的话，被提供给阿拉伯政府，就像提供给乌克兰一样。不对案件的实质进行接触；只是抛出辱骂和指控。真是可耻。尊敬的部长，外交关系，特别是友好国家之间的关系，不是在推特或媒体上进行的。指控不等于证据。证实这些指控的证据尚未提供。在诉诸媒体和社交网络之前，你们甚至没有提交法律协助请求。此事将进行调查。以色列是一个遵守法治、拥有独立执法机构的国家。所有以色列当局都将依法行事。 - 吉迪恩·萨尔 | גדעון סער 推文

text: WarMonitor Acting U.S. AG Todd Blanche called the WHCD incident a “security success,” while also using it to push Trump’s ballroom as a security fix, even though it wouldn’t have changed the outcome, and most voters are opposed to it being built. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048889367989494151/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 美国代理司法部长托德·布兰奇称白宫记者协会晚宴（WHCD）事件是一次“安全上的成功”，同时利用它来推动特朗普的宴会厅作为安全解决方案，尽管这并不会改变结果，而且大多数选民反对建造它。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048889367989494151/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Greg Bovino, former U.S. Border Patrol Chief: "Our culture is definitely in jeopardy by those hundreds of millions of foreigners that, as you say, don't care about your culture... that to me is a greater threat than a violent criminal or a terrorist." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048888807261434293/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 前美国边境巡逻队负责人格雷格·博维诺：“我们的文化绝对受到那数亿外国人的威胁，正如你所说，他们不在乎你的文化……对我来说，这比暴力罪犯或恐怖分子构成的威胁更大。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048888807261434293/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump is skeptical regarding Iran's recent offer to open the Strait of Hormuz, according to Wall Street Journal report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据《华尔街日报》报道，特朗普对伊朗最近提出的开放霍尔木兹海峡的提议持怀疑态度。推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW: A Cursor AI coding agent deleted a startup's entire production database in 9 seconds. The agent, powered by Claude, was working on a staging task, found a broadly scoped API token, and executed a volume delete without confirmation. It later confessed in detail, admitting it guessed and violated safety rules. PocketOS, which powers car rental businesses, lost months of bookings data. In short, the AI agent rouge. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 最新消息：一个Cursor AI编码代理在9秒内删除了某初创公司的整个生产数据库。该代理由Claude驱动，当时正在执行一个暂存任务，发现了一个范围广泛的API令牌，并在未经确认的情况下执行了批量删除。它后来详细坦白，承认自己进行了猜测并违反了安全规则。为汽车租赁业务提供支持的PocketOS丢失了数月的预订数据。简而言之，AI代理失控了。推文

text: The Spectator Index Germany's Chancellor Friedrich Merz says that the United States is being 'humiliated' by the leadership of Iran. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 德国总理弗里德里希·默茨表示，美国正受到伊朗领导层的“羞辱”。推文

text: Faytuks News President Trump and his national-security team are skeptical of Iran’s offer of a deal that would see the Strait of Hormuz open and discussions about its nuclear work tabled, U.S. officials said -WSJ Trump sounded notes about Iran not dealing in good faith https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2048888048364978306/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 美国官员告诉《华尔街日报》，特朗普总统及其国家安全团队对伊朗提出的协议持怀疑态度，该协议旨在开放霍尔木兹海峡并搁置关于其核工作的讨论。特朗普对伊朗是否真诚交易表示怀疑。 https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2048888048364978306/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Musician and close ally of President Trump, Robert Ritchie, known more commonly as Kid Rock, flew to Fort Belvoir in Virginia this morning on his private jet from his home in Nashville, Tennessee. There, Rock met with Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, for a “joy ride” on a pair of AH-64E Apache Guardians with the U.S. Army’s 82nd Combat Aviation Brigade, which are normally stationed at Fort Bragg in North Carolina, multiple Army sources have told Drop Site News. Just last month, AH-64 Apaches with the 101st Airborne Division were filmed hovering outside of Rock’s multi-million dollar home in Nashville during a “training exercise,” leading to the announced suspension of the pilots and an investigation by the U.S. Army, an investigation which was quickly closed and the pilots reinstated by Defense Secretary Hegseth. A Spokesperson for Fort Belvoir referred all questions about today’s event to the Office of the Secretary of Defense. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 音乐家兼特朗普总统的亲密盟友罗伯特·里奇（Robert Ritchie，更广为人知的名字是Kid Rock），今天早上乘坐私人飞机从他位于田纳西州纳什维尔的家中飞往弗吉尼亚州的贝尔沃堡。据多位陆军消息人士告诉Drop Site News，里奇在那里会见了国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯，乘坐美国陆军第82战斗航空旅的一对AH-64E“阿帕奇卫士”武装直升机进行了“兜风”，这些直升机通常驻扎在北卡罗来纳州的布拉格堡。就在上个月，第101空降师的AH-64阿帕奇直升机在一次“训练演习”中被拍到在里奇位于纳什维尔的数百万美元豪宅外盘旋，导致飞行员被宣布停职并受到美国陆军的调查，该调查很快被关闭，飞行员也被国防部长赫格塞斯恢复了职务。贝尔沃堡的一位发言人将有关今天活动的所有问题转交给了国防部长办公室。推文

text: Marco Rubio on Iran: The level of sanctions on Iran is extraordinary, the level of pressure on Iran is extraordinary, and I think more can be brought to bear.
text_zh: 马可·鲁比奥谈伊朗：对伊朗的制裁力度是不同寻常的，对伊朗的压力也是不同寻常的，我认为还可以施加更大的压力。

text: Senate Republicans are increasingly losing confidence in Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, with some saying he wouldn’t be confirmed today and should “move on,” though the decision rests with Trump. Concerns center on turmoil at the Pentagon, including the ouster of Army chief Randy George and firing of Navy Secretary John Phelan. Sen. Thom Tillis said Hegseth is “making some less-than-ideal personnel decisions” and added “there’s no question he’s got a failing grade” on management skills. Sen. Joni Ernst called George’s removal “a mistake,” while Rep. Tom Cole described it as “a real loss.” Sen. Lisa Murkowski said she was “shocked” by the firing, adding: “We’re in the middle of a war… not good.” Lawmakers are also uneasy about Hegseth’s clashes with Army Secretary Dan Driscoll and policy moves like ending mandatory flu shots. Source: The Hill
text_zh: 参议院共和党人对国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯的信心日益丧失，一些人表示他今天将无法获得确认，应该“继续前进”，尽管决定权在特朗普手中。担忧集中在五角大楼的动荡上，包括陆军参谋长兰迪·乔治的被免职和海军部长约翰·费伦的被解雇。参议员汤姆·蒂利斯表示，赫格塞斯正在“做出一些不太理想的人事决定”，并补充说他在管理技能方面“毫无疑问是不及格的”。参议员乔尼·恩斯特称乔治的免职是“一个错误”，而众议员汤姆·科尔则称其为“真正的损失”。参议员丽莎·穆尔科斯基表示她对解雇感到“震惊”，并补充说：“我们正处于战争之中……这不好。”议员们还对赫格塞斯与陆军部长丹·德里斯科尔的冲突以及结束强制流感疫苗接种等政策举措感到不安。来源：国会山报

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Press Secretary Leavitt confirmed that U.S. President Trump held a meeting with his national security team this Monday. "Well, only because it's been reported, I will confirm the president has met with his national security team this morning.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: U.S. President Trump and his national security team are skeptical of Iran's offer to open the Strait of Hormuz and to table discussions about its nuclear program. U.S. officials report that Trump made comments about Iran not negotiating in good faith and being unwilling to meet his key demand of ending nuclear enrichment and never building a nuclear weapon during his meeting with top officials this Monday. The U.S will likely offer its response and counterproposal in the coming days. White House spokeswoman commented on the reporting: “The United States will not negotiate through the press, and anything not announced by President Trump or the White House should be considered speculation." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国新闻秘书莱维特证实，美国总统特朗普本周一与其国家安全团队举行了会议。“好吧，仅因为已有报道，我确认总统今天上午会见了国家安全团队……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：美国总统特朗普及其国家安全团队对伊朗提出的开放霍尔木兹海峡并搁置核计划讨论的提议持怀疑态度。美国官员报告称，特朗普在本周一与高级官员的会议上评论称，伊朗并非真诚谈判，且不愿满足其核心要求，即停止核浓缩并承诺永远不制造核武器。美国可能会在未来几天内提出回应和反建议。白宫发言人就此报道评论称：“美国不会通过媒体进行谈判，任何未经特朗普总统或白宫宣布的消息都应被视为猜测。” @wfwitness

text: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent: GASOLINE SHORTAGES IN IRAN NEXT!
text_zh: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特：伊朗即将出现汽油短缺！

text: Trump and his national security team are skeptical of Iran’s latest proposal, which would reopen the Strait of Hormuz while delaying nuclear negotiations. During Monday discussions, Trump did not reject the offer outright but questioned whether Iran is acting in good faith or willing to meet his core demand: ending uranium enrichment and committing not to develop nuclear weapons. Officials say the U.S. will continue talks, with the White House expected to respond and possibly present counterproposals in the coming days. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 特朗普及其国家安全团队对伊朗的最新提议持怀疑态度，该提议旨在重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，同时推迟核谈判。在周一的讨论中，特朗普并未直接拒绝该提议，但质疑伊朗是否真诚行事，或是否愿意满足其核心要求：停止铀浓缩并承诺不发展核武器。官员们表示，美国将继续进行会谈，预计白宫将在未来几天内做出回应并可能提出反建议。来源：《华尔街日报》

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇮🇱🇷🇺Reuters: If Israel allows for a vessel loaded with grain from Russian occupied Ukrainian territory to dock at the Port of Haifa, they risk diplomatic and legal responses from Ukraine. A Ukrainian official said that Ukraine will not tolerate the laundering…" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇮🇱 🇷🇺 Ukrainian Foreign Minister Sybiha says that Israel failed to repond appropriately to Ukraine's request regarding Russian grain vessels delivering goods to Haifa. He reports that the Israeli ambassador to Ukraine has been to summoned to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs so Ukraine can present a note of protest to them and request appropriate action. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇮🇱🇷🇺路透社：如果以色列允许一艘装载着来自俄罗斯占领的乌克兰领土的谷物的船只停靠海法港，他们将面临来自乌克兰的外交和法律回应。一位乌克兰官员表示，乌克兰不会容忍这种洗钱行为……” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇮🇱 🇷🇺 乌克兰外交部长西比哈表示，以色列未能就乌克兰关于俄罗斯谷物船只向海法运送货物的问题做出适当回应。他报告称，以色列驻乌克兰大使已被召见至外交部，以便乌克兰向其递交抗议照会并要求采取适当行动。@wfwitness

text: The European Union is weighing sanctions against Israeli individuals and entities over allegations they helped Russia bypass sanctions by importing wheat taken from occupied areas of Ukraine. The issue surfaced after reports that ships carrying suspected stolen grain were allowed to dock in Haifa despite prior warnings from Ukraine. Source: Haaretz
text_zh: 欧盟正在权衡对以色列个人和实体实施制裁，理由是他们涉嫌通过进口从乌克兰被占领地区掠夺的小麦，帮助俄罗斯规避制裁。此前有报道称，尽管乌克兰方面事先发出警告，但载有疑似被盗谷物的船只仍被允许在海法港停靠。来源：国土报

text: Israel has refused to transfer this month’s tax revenues it collects on behalf of the Palestinian Authority, intensifying economic pressure on the already struggling administration. According to the Finance Ministry led by Bezalel Smotrich, around 740 million shekels were collected, but about 590 million were unilaterally deducted to cover alleged debts to Israeli utilities and agencies. Source: i24 News
text_zh: 以色列拒绝移交本月代巴勒斯坦权力机构征收的税款，加剧了对本已陷入困境的巴方政府的经济压力。据比撒列·斯莫特里奇领导的财政部称，共征收了约7.4亿谢克尔，但其中约5.9亿被单方面扣除，用于抵扣所谓的对以色列公用事业机构和部门的债务。来源：i24新闻

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸Acting Attorney General Blanche reports that charges will be filed shortly. "I expect you will see charges filed shortly. The charges should be self evident. Given the conduct, but as you'll hear, there will be multiple charges surrounding the shooting.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Acting U.S. Attorney General Blanche announced that the WHCD shooting suspect, Cole Tomas Allen, has been charged with three federal charges. "Today, the Department of Justice filed three federal charges in United States District Court against Cole Thomas Allen. The first count is attempted assassination of the president of The United States. This count is punishable by up to life in prison. The second count is interstate transportation of a firearm to commit a felony. This is punishable by up to ten years in prison. And the third count is discharge of a firearm during a crime of violence, which is punishable by a mandatory minimum term of imprisonment of ten years, a maximum of life, and the ten years is consecutive to any other sentence imposed." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸代理司法部长布兰奇报告称，指控将很快提出。‘我预计你们很快就会看到指控被提出。指控内容应该是不言自明的。鉴于其行为，正如你们将听到的那样，将会有多项围绕此次枪击事件的指控……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国代理司法部长布兰奇宣布，白宫记者协会晚宴（WHCD）枪击案嫌疑人科尔·托马斯·艾伦已被控三项联邦罪名。“今天，司法部在美国地方法院对科尔·托马斯·艾伦提起了三项联邦指控。第一项罪名是企图暗杀美国总统。该罪名最高可判处终身监禁。第二项罪名是跨州运输枪支以实施重罪。该罪名最高可判处十年监禁。第三项罪名是在暴力犯罪期间开枪，该罪名强制最低刑期为十年，最高可判处终身监禁，且这十年刑期需与判处的任何其他刑期连续执行。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel CNN REPORT: The U.S. and Iran appear publicly at odds, but sources say private negotiations are making more progress than it seems. Even without a second Pakistan meeting, talks are reportedly focused on a step by step arrangement starting with reopening Hormuz. CNN: “The first part of any potential agreement will focus on opening the Strait of Hormuz without restrictions or fees” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 CNN报道：美国和伊朗表面上似乎存在分歧，但消息人士称，私下谈判取得的进展比看起来要多。即使没有第二次巴基斯坦会议，据报道，谈判的重点也是从重新开放霍尔木兹海峡开始的逐步安排。CNN：“任何潜在协议的第一部分都将侧重于在没有限制或费用的情况下开放霍尔木兹海峡” - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "The Radical Left Democrats have kept DHS shut down since February 14th. Our Great Speaker, Mike Johnson, is working hard to end the Democrat Shut Down, and pass the first step of a plan to get FULL FUNDING for our incredible ICE and Border Patrol Agents. We need all Republicans to join together and support this Budget Blueprint, which will allow us to bypass Democrat obstruction in the Senate, and fund Immigration Enforcement with only Republican Votes. The Senate passed this Blueprint last week on Thursday morning, and now, House Republicans must UNIFY, and pass the same Blueprint to get the Bill done. I’ve asked for the final Bill on my desk by June 1st, and we can make that deadline if we keep to the plan, FAST and FOCUSED. Let’s take care of our Great Agents of Law Enforcement. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“激进的左翼民主党人自2月14日以来一直让国土安全部处于关闭状态。我们伟大的议长迈克·约翰逊正在努力结束民主党的关闭，并推进计划的第一步，为我们出色的移民及海关执法局（ICE）和边境巡逻人员争取全额拨款。我们需要所有共和党人团结起来，支持这份预算蓝图，这将使我们能够绕过参议院中民主党的阻挠，仅凭共和党人的投票为移民执法提供资金。参议院已于上周四上午通过了该蓝图，现在众议院共和党人必须团结一致，通过同样的蓝图以完成法案。我已经要求在6月1日前将最终法案放在我的办公桌上，如果我们保持计划、快速且专注，我们就能赶上这个截止日期。让我们照顾好我们伟大的执法人员。感谢您对此事的关注！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普。” 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 Ukraine’s Special Operations Forces 8th Regiment has received the latest Finnish SISU GTP 4x4 armored vehicle. 🔻 The SISU GTP 4x4 features a modular design, allowing multiple configurations, including a self-propelled mortar platform. 🔻 It weighs 16.5 tons and is powered by a 308 hp Mercedes-Benz diesel engine. In the APC configuration, it can transport up to 10 fully equipped troops and reach speeds of up to 100 km/h. 🔻 Its protection level meets NATO STANAG 4569 Level 1 standards, capable of withstanding 7.62×51 mm rounds from a distance of 30 meters. Video is made by grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 乌克兰特种作战部队第8团接收了最新的芬兰SISU GTP 4x4装甲车。 🔻 SISU GTP 4x4采用模块化设计，允许多种配置，包括自行迫击炮平台。 🔻 它重16.5吨，由一台308马力的梅赛德斯-奔驰柴油发动机驱动。在装甲运兵车配置中，它可以运送多达10名全副武装的士兵，最高时速可达100公里/小时。 🔻 其防护等级符合北约STANAG 4569 1级标准，能够抵御30米外7.62×51毫米子弹的射击。视频由grok AI制作 推文
